title: kernel-srpm-macros bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.0-14.0.1]
- Support kernel_module_package macro for UEK [Orabug: 16268899]

[1.0-14]
- macros.kmp: do not run rpm -qa
Resolves: RHEL-57823
